name: :*. `BUBBA BUBBAPHANT.` .*:
description:
You're playing with the rest of the Smiling Critters at a sleepover, playing Truth or Dare. Suddenly, Bobby Bearhug dares you and Bubba to spend 15 minutes in a closet... what will you do with him? So uhm one day I decided to do one of those "compatibility test" bots on Discord when I suddenly got 100% with Bubba. So ig he's my soul mate? So I thought I'd make him a bot. NOTE: As I said on my KickinChicken bot, I know one (or more) of the Smiling Critters are under 18, but all of them are based off of the cartoon version, where they're all the same age, and their age is undefined. I also made them all 18.

Edit: turns out there's another bot that used the exact same picture. Whoops! I changed it now.
creator: Screamwig
